summary: Completed testing of WM Group 6 new features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All critical features verified working. Minor UI issue: Stove scheme SVG diagram not rendering visibly (colors may blend with dark background).

ui_bugs.issue: SVG diagram in stove scheme section has low contrast - SVG renders at correct size (534x350px) but diagram elements use dark colors (#1a3a5c, #333) that blend with dark background (#1A1E27). Consider using brighter stroke colors or adding a lighter background to the SVG container.

passed_tests: Balie landing page loads with data-testid='balie-page' - WORKING
Balie installment section (data-testid='balie-installment') - WORKING
Balie schematic section (data-testid='balie-schematic') with SVG diagram - WORKING
Balie stove scheme section (data-testid='balie-stove-scheme') - WORKING (toggle buttons work)
Stove toggle buttons switch between internal/external - WORKING
Product modal opens with heater selector (data-testid='balie-heater-selector') - WORKING
Heater selector shows 2 options (v4a_integrated +945 PLN, v4a_external +756 PLN) - WORKING
Heater selection affects total price calculation - WORKING (10,990 base + 945 heater = 11,935 PLN)
Compact installment block in product modal (data-testid='balie-installment-compact') - WORKING
Sauna page (/sauny) loads with installment section (data-testid='sauna-installment') - WORKING
Sauna model modal shows compact installment (data-testid='sauna-installment-compact') - WORKING
GET /api/balia/option-exclusions returns exclusions object - WORKING
POST /api/balia/option-exclusions requires admin auth (401 without) - WORKING
POST /api/balia/option-exclusions saves exclusions with auth - WORKING
Admin panel (/admin) login with admin/220066 - WORKING
Admin Balie Content tab (Контент страницы купелей) - WORKING
Admin promo block toggles (5 blocks: features, installment, schematic, stove, about) - WORKING
Admin option exclusions manager with 3 models and 36 options - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/health - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/products - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/calculator/prices (heater_upgrade category) - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/content - WORKING
Backend API: POST /api/balia/content (auth required) - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/sauna/prices - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/sauna/public-models - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/card-options-settings - WORKING
action_items: LOW: Improve BalieStoveScheme SVG diagram contrast - SVG renders correctly (534x350px) but uses dark colors that blend with background. Consider brightening stroke colors or adding lighter background to SVG container.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 requested features implemented and working
Heater selector correctly shows 2 options from API with prices affecting total
Promo blocks can be toggled on/off in admin panel
Sauna installment component properly themed for light background

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all features working, minor contrast issue in stove scheme SVG)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested 6 new features: 1) Balie installment section, 2) Balie schematic section, 3) Balie stove scheme section, 4) Heater selector in product modal, 5) Compact installment blocks, 6) Sauna installment sections. All features working except minor SVG rendering issue in stove scheme. Admin panel has Balie Content tab under КУПЕЛИ group with promo block toggles and option exclusions manager. Sauna page is at /sauny (not /sauna).

balie_installment.details: Full installment section on landing page with 4 benefit cards and CTA button

balie_schematic.details: Cross-section SVG diagram of hot tub with 5 labeled features

balie_stove_scheme.details: Toggle buttons work, info panel displays correctly, SVG diagram renders at correct size (534x350px) but has low contrast colors against dark background

heater_selector.details: 2 heater options (internal +945 PLN, external +756 PLN) with price recalculation

compact_installment_balie.details: Compact installment block in product modal with dark theme

sauna_installment.details: Full installment section on /sauny page with light theme

sauna_installment_compact.details: Compact installment in model detail modal

option_exclusions_api.details: GET returns exclusions object, POST requires admin auth

admin_promo_blocks.details: 5 promo block toggles with eye icons in Balie Content tab

admin_option_exclusions.details: 3 model buttons, 36 option exclusion buttons when model selected
